home.title: TurboLoop — Noman Riba na DeFi a BSC
home.description: Sami har zuwa 54% ROI a cikin kwanaki 60 daga ainihin USDC/USDT liquidity pool. An bincike, LP-locked, mallakar an yi watsi da ita. Mafi ƙaranci 1 USDT.

testimonial.title: A cikin kalmansu.
testimonial.quote: Na kasance a cikin DeFi tsawon shekaru hudu. TurboLoop shine farkon aikin da na yarda da shi sosai har na iya ba da shawara ga iyalina. Dubawa, renouncement, LP da aka kulle — sun cire dukkan hujjojin da ba za a yi imani da su ba.
testimonial.author: Adesina O.

newsletter.title: Imel guda daya. Sabbin abubuwa na gaskiya. Babu cike.
newsletter.subtitle: Lokacin da wani abu na gaskiya ya tashi — sabon fim, sabon shiri, wani muhimmin matakin tsaro — za ku kasance na farko da za ku sani. Babu spam, ko da yaushe. Kashe rajista da dannawa guda daya.
newsletter.successBody: Kalli akwatin saƙon ku don sabuwar sanarwa ta farko.
newsletter.errorInvalidEmail: Don Allah shigar da adireshin imel mai inganci.
newsletter.errorGeneric: Ba a iya yin rijista — sake gwadawa nan gaba.
newsletter.consentText: Ta hanyar aika imel ɗinku kuna yarda da karɓar sanarwa lokaci-lokaci daga Turbo Loop. Kashe rajista a kowane lokaci.
newsletter.inlineError: Wannan ba ya kama da adireshin imel mai inganci.
newsletter.followOn: Ko tsallake akwatin saƙo · Bi a

events.title: Zaman Zoom kullum
events.subtitle: Al'umma na gudanar da zaman Zoom kyauta kowace rana. Shiga, tambayi komai, samun horo. Babu talla, babu matsin lamba, tattaunawa na gaskiya a cikin yaranku.
events.sessionType1Detail: Bude Zoom a yare 12+ — Turanci, Hindi, Indonesian, Portuguese, Rasha, Turkiyya, Sifaniyya + ƙari. Shiga a kowane lokaci.
events.sessionType2Detail: Masu magana na asali suna gudanar da kiran a cikin yaranku. Muna biya su $100/kowane wata — nema a /apply.
events.sessionType3Detail: Sabbin shiga DeFi? Kananan ƙungiyoyin kiran suna koya muku yadda ake saita walat, ajiyar ku na farko, da lissafi.
events.findYourCallDetail: Hanyoyin kai tsaye suna tashi kowace rana a Telegram ɗin mu na hukuma. Zaɓi yarenka, shiga.

social-wall.title: Sauti daga ko'ina.
social-wall.subtitle: Dukkan bidiyon TurboLoop da al'umma suka yi, a wuri guda. Labarai, koyarwa, takaitaccen bayani — da tawagar ta tsara, kyauta don kallo, shirye don raba. Aika naka kuma shiga ganuwar.
social-wall.submitBody: Ka yi bidiyon TurboLoop? Raba mahaɗin — an amince da abubuwan da aka aika nan cikin awanni 48 kuma suna iya cancanta don biyan Creator Star.
social-wall.refreshNote: Zaɓuɓɓukan da aka nuna na farko · ana sabunta kowace minti 5
social-wall.emptyBody: Ka kasance na farko da zai sauka anan — aika bidiyon TurboLoop naka kuma tawaga za ta amince cikin awanni 48.

ecosystem.title: Ginshikai shida. Injin guda daya.
ecosystem.subtitle: TurboLoop ba shi da samfur guda ɗaya — yana da ginshikai shida na DeFi da ke aiki tare a matsayin juyawa mai ƙarfi. Kowanne yana ciyar da sauran.
ecosystem.pillar1Body: Ajiyar USDT na lokaci ɗaya da ke samar da riba kullum. Zaɓi shirin 30, 60, ko 90-day. Asalin an kulle; ribar tana haɗuwa ko cirewa kowace rana.
ecosystem.pillar2Body: 12% akan Taimako na Mataki na 1, 3% akan Mataki na 2. An biya su nan da nan a USDT akan kowanne ajiyar da hanyar sadarwar ku ta yi — babu jira, babu ƙayyadaddun ƙima.
ecosystem.pillar3Body: Shirye-shiryen makonni 7 masu sauri ga membobin da ke son saurin juyin kuɗi. Hanya ɗaya ta ribar kullum, lokaci mai takaitawa.
ecosystem.pillar4Body: Samu biyan kuɗi na kallo don abubuwan TurboLoop. Aika bidiyonka, amince, kuma tattara USDT duk lokacin da aka kalli.
ecosystem.pillar5Body: Gudanar da zaman Zoom na al'umma na mako-mako a cikin yarenka. Muna rufe kuɗin gudanarwa — $100/kowane wata a USDT.
ecosystem.pillar6Body: Har zuwa $100,000 USDT don gano matsalolin kwangilar hankali da aka tabbatar. Buɗe ga kowa, ko'ina. Babu buƙatar NDA.
ecosystem.metaTitle: Tsarin Muhalli na TurboLoop — Ginshikai shida na DeFi
ecosystem.metaDesc: Bincika ginshikai shida na DeFi da ke haɗe da TurboLoop: Shirye-shiryen Loop, Injin Taimako, Sprint Loop, Tattalin Masu ƙirƙira, Shirin Masu Gabatarwa na Gida, da Kyautar Tsaro.

community.title: Sauti daga ko'ina.
community.subtitle: Kasashe 14+. Continents 6. Yaren 12+. Al'ummar TurboLoop ta duniya ne ta hanyar ƙira — ƙasa ba ta ƙayyade makomar kuɗin ku.
community.globalBody: Kowane kayan aiki, kowane zaman, kowane abu na ciki an gina shi don aiki a cikin yaranku da lokacin ku. Babu wanda aka bar baya.
community.telegramDetail: Babban cibiyar. Sanarwa, tallafi, hanyoyin Zoom na kullum, da tattaunawar al'umma — duka a wuri guda.
community.twitterDetail: Sabuntawar kasuwa, labaran tsarin muhalli, da haskaka al'umma. Bi don samun TurboLoop na ainihi.
community.youtubeDetail: Fim-fim na fina-finai, koyarwa yadda za a shiga cikin yaruka 10, da reels na al'umma. Kyauta don kallo, shirye don raba.
community.metaTitle: Al'ummar TurboLoop — DeFi na Duniya a cikin Yare 12+
community.metaDesc: Shiga al'ummar TurboLoop a Telegram, X, da YouTube. Kasashe 14+, continents 6, yare 12+.

films.title: Jerin Fina-finai na TurboLoop.
films.subtitle: Fina-finai masu ɗan gajeren lokaci da ke bayanin kowane bangare na tsarin muhalli na TurboLoop — daga tsaro na kwangilar hankali zuwa lissafin riba na kullum. Kyauta don kallo, shirye don raba.
films.noFilms: Babu fina-finai da ke akwai tukuna.
films.metaTitle: Fina-finai na TurboLoop — Jerin Ilimin DeFi na Fina-finai
films.metaDesc: Kalli jerin fina-finai na TurboLoop. Fina-finai masu ɗan gajeren lokaci da ke bayanin noman riba na DeFi, tsaro na kwangilar hankali, hanyoyin tura masu taimako, da ƙari.

roadmap.title: Abin da aka gina. Abin da ke tafe.
roadmap.subtitle: Kwangilar hankali ta ƙarshe ce kuma ba za a iya canzawa ba — babu ƙara fasali a kan tsarin kanta. Taswirar hanya tana game da isa, ilimi, da al'umma.
roadmap.phase1Body: An ƙaddamar da kwangilar hankali, an duba ta, kuma an renounce a BSC. Shirye-shiryen Loop suna aiki. Injin tura masu taimako yana aiki.
roadmap.phase2Body: An ƙaddamar da Shirin Masu Gabatarwa na Gida. Zaman Zoom na kullum a cikin yaruka 12+. Kasashe 14+ sun kai.
roadmap.phase3Body: An ƙaddamar da jerin fina-finai. Tsarin biyan masu ƙirƙira yana aiki. Ganuwar Zamantakewa tana aiki.
roadmap.phase4Body: An ƙirƙiri Babban Kasuwa da banners 2,800+ a cikin yaruka 14. Blog da ƙarin labarai 2,500+. Sashen koyo yana aiki.
roadmap.phase5Body: An ƙaddamar da Sprint Loop. Shirye-shiryen ƙaddamar da token. Shirin haɗin kai na duniya.
roadmap.metaTitle: Taswirar Hanya na TurboLoop — Muhimman Matakai da Tsare-tsare na Gaba
roadmap.metaDesc: Duba abin da TurboLoop ya gina da abin da ke tafe. Kwangilar hankali ba ta canzawa — taswirar hanya tana game da isa, ilimi, da ci gaban al'umma.

library.title: Duka a cikin ɗakuna guda daya.

library.noContent: Babu abubuwan da ke akwai tukuna.

library.metaDesc: Dukkan kayan aikin ka na TurboLoop. Fina-finai masu ɗan gajeren lokaci, reels, da gabatarwa — duka kyauta don kallo da raba.

careers.subtitle: Jagoranci zaman Zoom na al'umma na mako-mako kuma za mu rufe kuɗin gudanarwa kowane wata.
careers.roleBody: Gudanar da zaman Zoom na mako-mako a cikin yarenka. Gina al'ummarka ta gida. Samu $100/kowane wata a USDT.
careers.req1: Yana da ƙwarewa a yarenka da kake niyya
careers.req4: Yana da sha'awa game da DeFi da 'yancin kuɗi
careers.benefit2: Jadawalin sassauƙa — kai ne ke saita lokacin
careers.benefit3: Takardar shaidar mai gabatarwa na TurboLoop na hukuma
careers.benefit4: Samun damar zuwa kayan masu gabatarwa na musamman
careers.metaTitle: Ayyukan TurboLoop — Zama Mai Gabatarwa na Gida

promotions.title: Hanyoyi guda uku na samun kuɗi.
promotions.subtitle: Kyautar tsaro ta dubu shida, biyan kuɗi na kallo ga masu ƙirƙira, da kuɗin kuɗi na kowane wata ga shugabannin al'umma. Duk an biya su a cikin stablecoins.
promotions.bountyBody: Nemo haɗarin tsari, matsala, ko tsarin rug-pull a cikin kwangilar hankali da aka ƙaddamar. Idan an tabbatar, $100,000 za a biya a USDT cikin kwanaki 7.
promotions.creatorBody: Aika bidiyon TurboLoop, aika shi zuwa Ganuwar Zamantakewa, kuma ka samu USDT duk lokacin da aka kalli. Babu buƙatar kallo mafi ƙanƙanta.
promotions.presenterBody: Gudanar da zaman Zoom na al'umma na mako-mako a cikin yarenka. Muna rufe kuɗin gudanarwa kowane wata, an biya a USDT.
promotions.metaTitle: Tallace-tallacen TurboLoop — Hanyoyi guda uku na samun kuɗi
promotions.metaDesc: Samu kuɗi tare da TurboLoop: kyautar tsaro $100K, biyan masu ƙirƙira na kallo, da kuɗin kuɗi na kowane wata $100. Duk an biya su a cikin stablecoins na USDT.

learn.title: Koyi DeFi daga tushe.
learn.subtitle: Takaitattun bayanai ga waɗanda ba su taɓa crypto ba. Babu jargon, babu ƙari. Kowanne yana ƙarewa da yadda yake haɗuwa da TurboLoop.
learn.lesson1Body: DeFi na decentralized a cikin harshen da ya dace. Menene, me yasa yake da mahimmanci, da yadda yake bambanta da banki.
learn.lesson2Body: Lambar da ke aiwatar da kanta a kan blockchain. Babu mai tsaka-tsaki, babu buƙatar amincewa — dokokin suna cikin kwangilar.
learn.lesson3Body: Crypto wanda ba ya tashi ko fadi. USDT, USDC — an daidaita su da dalar Amurka don asalin ku ya kasance mai ƙarfi.
learn.lesson4Body: Samun kuɗin shiga na rashin aiki ta hanyar sanya stablecoins ɗinku aiki a cikin ƙa'idodin DeFi. Yadda yake aiki, menene haɗarin.
learn.lesson5Body: Jagora mataki-mataki na karanta kwangilar hankali a kan BscScan. Menene za a duba, menene alamar ja.
learn.metaTitle: Koyi DeFi — Jagororin Farko Kyauta | TurboLoop
learn.metaDesc: Sabon shiga DeFi? Koyi menene noman riba, yadda kwangilar hankali ke aiki, menene stablecoins, da yadda za a samu kuɗin shiga na rashin aiki a kan BSC. Jagororin kyauta, babu jargon.

protocol.subtitle: Hanyoyi hudu na samun riba. Hoton shawarwari na matakai 20. Matsayi 7 na shugabanci. Lambar da aka duba. Tsari guda ɗaya — an gina shi don a duba, ba don a amince da shi ba.

plans.subtitle: Jari da ribar da aka dawo da ita a ƙarshen shirin — babu dabarun haɗawa, babu wasan kwaikwayo na shekara-shekara.

numbers.stat2Help: Fina-finai a cikin Sovereign Series & Cinematic Universe

security.title: Dalilai biyar na rashin amincewa da kowa.
security.subtitle: Mun cire duk hanyar da za mu iya cutar da ku. Abin da ya rage shine lamba, an buga shi, an kulle shi, kuma an tabbatar da shi ta mutane da ba su aiki a gare mu ba.
security.reason1Body: An tura kwangilar kuma an ƙyale ta. Babu makullin admin, babu proxy na haɓakawa, babu aikin tsayawa. Ko masu kafa ba za su iya canza shi ba.
security.reason2Body: Ribar tana fitowa daga rukunin liquidity na tsarin — ba daga sababbin ajiya ba. Lissafin yana aiki ko da ba a ƙara sababbin membobi ba.
security.reason3Body: An ƙyale mallakar lokacin tura. Babu walat da zai iya zuba kuɗi, ya daskare asusun, ko ya canza sigogi.
security.reason4Body: An buga cikakken asalin kwangilar kuma an tabbatar da shi a BscScan. Kowa zai iya karanta kowace layi kafin ya ajiye dala guda.
security.reason5Body: Mun sanya $100,000 USDT a tebur don duk wanda ya gano matsalar tsaro. Bude ga kowa, babu NDA, an biya cikin kwanaki 7 na tabbatarwa.
security.metaTitle: TurboLoop Security — Tsarin Smart Contract mai Dindindin & $100K Bounty
security.metaDesc: Tsarin smart contract na TurboLoop ba shi da canji, an ƙyale shi, kuma yana da tushen buɗe. Babu makullin admin, babu proxy na haɓakawa. $100,000 USDT bounty don matsalolin da aka tabbatar.

zoom.title: Al'umma tana
zoom.subtitle: Mutane na gaskiya, amsoshi na gaskiya. Kowace rana.

reels.title: Kowane fim. Wuri guda.
reels.subtitle: Bidiyo masu gajeren lokaci, yadda ake shiga cikin harsuna 15, koyarwar cirewa + haɗawa + shawarwari. Kyauta don kallo, shirye don rabawa.
reels.categoryPresentationDesc: Shorts na Sovereign Series + gabatarwar ayyukan harsuna da dama.
reels.categoryHowToJoinDesc: Mataki-mataki na hanyoyi a cikin harsuna 15: shigar da walat → sayi USDT → zaɓi Loop Plan.
reels.categoryWithdrawDesc: Yadda ake karɓar kuɗin yau da kullum, sake saka kuɗi don haɗawa, da amfani da tsarin shawarwari.
reels.metaTitle: TurboLoop Reels — Short DeFi Videos in 15 Languages
reels.metaDesc: Kalli TurboLoop reels: yadda ake shiga cikin harsuna 15, koyarwar cirewa da haɗawa, shawarwari. Kyauta don kallo.

creatives.title: Banners kyauta. Shirye don rabawa.
creatives.subtitle: Kayan kamfen, ginshikan alama, da kayan ilimi na harsuna 14. Zazzage, raba a Telegram ko WhatsApp — babu buƙatar ambato.
creatives.metaTitle: TurboLoop Marketing Hub — Banners 2,800+ na Kyauta a Harsuna 14
creatives.metaDesc: Zazzage banners na kasuwanci na DeFi 2,800+ kyauta. Harsuna 14, kayan kamfen, kayan ilimi na alama. Kyauta ga al'ummar TurboLoop.
